description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold Wash with similar colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Flat dry in shade puma's t-shirt is the latest must-have from this classy brand. Add the right amount of glam by wearing this with a fitted pencil skirt and peep-toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
